raw_response_text:
<features>
- Large flower with multiple wide, overlapping petals
- Petals are white/light with a distinct pink stripe running down the center
- Central cluster of dark/purplish stamens/pistils
</features>
<kb>
- IF [flower has multiple wide petals with a central pink stripe and dark center] THEN [81]
- IF [flower is yellow with drooping petals and a green stem] THEN [14]
</kb>
<rule_check>
- The Target Image matches the pattern of class 81, as it features large, wide petals with a prominent pink stripe down the middle and a dark central cluster.
</rule_check>

<response>81</response>

<features>
- yellow flower petals
- large, broad petals with some dark veining/streaks near the center
- long, thin, blade-like green leaves in the background
</features>
<kb>
- IF [flower has purple/pink petals with white edges and a dark center] THEN [81]
- IF [flower has yellow petals and long, thin, blade-like green leaves] THEN [14]
</kb>
<rule_check>
- The Target Image features a yellow flower with broad petals and long, thin, blade-like green leaves, which matches the pattern seen in the examples for class 14.
</rule_check>

<response>14</response>
